MATTER ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, JUNE 07, 2010. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC'S (DBA GREAT WESTERN) NOTICE AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT JR., NOT REPORTED (612).

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Dand Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar for Monday, June 07, 2010. No appearance by either party. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN Notice Dand Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
